title: ヒシアマ寮長の朝ご飯

text_block_list.text: One morning, in the Miho Dormitory cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hold it there, Turbo! You're not leavin' till you
eat a proper breakfast!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
No way, Jose! I've got a cool donut right here,
and that's all I need!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That sugar bomb isn't a meal! Now sit your butt
down and eat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Breakfast is the most important meal of the day,
got it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You've got to have a main dish, a side dish, and a
nice bowl of miso soup in order to get all the
nutrients your body needs!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I don't want that stuff! I want my donut! I like that
it's got rainbow chocolate and silver sprinkles! So
there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I told you to hold it—hey! Stop right theeere!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, she's hopeless! But I guess it's still better
than having nothing at all...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Crap, I need to hurry and start my solo training! I
don't have time to eat breakfast today.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll just keep it simple with some toast
today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Come on, guys—breakfast is important!
Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it's gettin' to be a real problem. I just
want everyone in the dorm to eat a proper
breakfast!

Hishi Amazon seems quite worried about her
dorm residents, especially Twin Turbo.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She won't listen! All she eats is junk with more
food coloring than nutrients.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And then she acts like it's some huge ordeal to
eat a couple balanced dishes instead of one big
snack.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried that she'll randomly collapse during
training if she keeps this up...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've been noticin' a lot of students following
Turbo's lead and skipping out on breakfast too.

She's practically at the end of her tether. There
has to be a way to solve this...
choice_data_list:
What if you start offering eye-catching
breakfast options?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, like the kind of stuff Turbo likes? But the
food's gotta be nutritious too... What would fit
the bill?
choice_data_list:
How about some quick 'n' easy rice balls in fun
shapes?
How about some really colorful sandwiches?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Rice balls... That's it! We can use multicolored
vegetables as the filling and kill two birds with
one, well, rice ball!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And if I make 'em look interesting enough, even
Turbo might want a bite!
choice_data_list: You can even make cute lunch boxes with them!
You can even make cute lunch boxes with them!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Turbo won't eat anything she doesn't like
the look of, but if I can make it visually appealing
enough, I bet she'll scarf it all down!
The next day at the Miho Dormitory kitchen...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
These rice balls are nice and seasoned, and these
are filled with meat-wrapped veggies... Top them
off with seaweed sheets, and there! A perfect
little bear!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that looks really cool! And tasty!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, perfect timing! Go ahead, eat as much of
this as you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Can you make this for me every day,
Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I sure can! I'll make lots of different things for you
to try!

The cutely-shaped stuffed rice balls go on to
become wildly popular at Miho Dorm.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea. The colors would give it some
pop while keepin' the nutritional value!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Turbo loves food with flashy colors, so I just gotta
make them look so gaudy she'll gulp them down
without a thought!
choice_data_list:
Then you're set! You're great at making cute
food.

Then you're set! You're great at making cute
food.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, cooking up breakfast is easy as pie!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I present to you my clubhouse sandwiches, made
with plenty of meat and veggies. And these
dessert sandwiches are made with fresh fruit!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Whoa, they look so pretty and yummy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
They'd better! I got up early to make them for
you!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You did?! Aw, thanks! I'm gonna name this
sandwich the Turbo Special!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, mission complete! Now she's guaranteed to
eat a proper breakfast every day!

The generously filled, colorful sandwiches go on
to become wildly popular at Miho Dorm.
